reference: YET IN EARNEST YOUR FATHER WILL NOT FIND MY BROTHER PEYTON WANTING IN CIVILITY THOUGH HE IS NOT A MAN OF MUCH COMPLIMENT UNLESS IT BE IN HIS LETTERS TO ME NOR AN UNREASONABLE PERSON IN ANYTHING SO HE WILL ALLOW HIM OUT OF HIS KINDNESS TO HIS WIFE TO SET A HIGHER VALUE UPON HER SISTER THAN SHE DESERVES
text: Yet in earnest, your father will not find my brother Payton wanting in civility, though he is not a man of much compliment, unless it be in his letters to me. Nor an unreasonable person in anything; so he will allow him out of his kindness to his wife to set a higher value upon her sister than she deserves.
